top_signals.title: Microsoft’s $613 Billion Rout Sets Up Its Worst Month Since 2000
top_signals.summary: Microsoft Corp. shares are heading for their worst month in years as investors continue to fret about how the software giant will fare in a world marked by artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
